title: Short title
doc_html:
§430. Short title

            This Part of this Chapter shall be known and may be referred to by the short title: "Electric Cooperative Law."

            Renumbered from R.S.1950, §12:330 by Acts 1968, No. 105, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1969.
doc_text:
§430.  Short title
This Part of this Chapter shall be known and may be referred to by the short
title: "Electric Cooperative Law."
Renumbered from R.S.1950, §12:330 by Acts 1968, No. 105, §3, eff. Jan. 1,
1969.
